title: Module 1 knowledge check
markdown: Two quick questions about official marketplace courses.

questions.prompt: How do learners get access to an official marketplace course?
choices: They claim it from the marketplace (opt-in)
Every account is auto-enrolled at signup
Only Global Admins can enroll them
They must pay via Stripe first

questions.prompt: Official marketplace courses in this epic are priced at:
choices: Whatever the instructor sets at checkout

questions.prompt: Official marketplace course content is authored in the repository as Markdown and JSON.
